headline: Capital One Financial Corporation (COF): Stephen Mandel Trims Stake
summary: We just covered Lone Pine’s Non-AI Strategy Falters: 10 Non-AI Stocks Weighing Down Stephen Mandel’s 2026 Returns and Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) ranks 4th on this list. Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) first appeared in the 13F portfolio of Lone Pine Capital in the fourth quarter of 2012. This holding comprised 4.4 million shares. […]

headline: Current 1031 Introduces 3% Interest on All Exchange Funds, Held with Capital One
summary: MANHATTAN BEACH, Calif., April 29, 2026--Current 1031 LLC, a California-based Qualified Intermediary, has unveiled an industry-leading 3% interest rate on all 1031 exchanges.
